message:
bd-3mjjt.3: Golden frame comparison for replay verification

Cell-by-cell buffer comparison module in ftui-harness with:
- FrameComparator: BLAKE3 checksum fast-path + cell-by-cell diff
- CellMismatch reporting with (row, col, expected, actual) detail
- Size mismatch detection with graceful clipped comparison
- SequenceResult for multi-frame golden comparison
- 17 unit tests covering identity, mismatches, size diffs, color diffs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
